svg.style: background: transparent; background-color: transparent; color-scheme: light dark;

box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 18px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; font-weight: bold; white-space: nowrap;

div.div: InsightStream AI — Request Lifecycle: feedback submission → AI analysis → realtime dashboard update

div.div: Verified against code 2026-07-03; worker-split and team-room updates verified 2026-07-11 (apps/api/src/modules/feedback, ai, events, worker.module.ts). Steps 1–5 are synchronous HTTP request/response — the widget gets its 200 OK here. Steps 6–10 happen asynchronously, after the response already returned; steps 6 and 9 run in a separate WORKER_MODE process since 2026-07-09.

rect.style: fill: light-dark(rgb(218, 232, 252), rgb(29, 41, 59)); stroke: light-dark(rgb(108, 142, 191), rgb(92, 121, 163));

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 158px; height: 1px; padding-top: 200px; margin-left: 1px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 12px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
1. Widget
end user submits feedback

div.div: Separate scheduled trigger — not initiated by end-user feedback submission. Weekly AI digest, scheduled in-process via @Cron (Mon 09:00). The duplicate EventBridge→Lambda trigger was removed 2026-07-03.
